## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat`: New feature
- [ ] `fix`: Bug fix
- [ ] `docs`: Documentation
- [ ] `refactor`: Code restructuring
- [ ] `perf`: Performance improvement
- [ ] `test`: Tests
- [ ] `chore`: Maintenance
- [ ] Breaking change (add `!` after type or `BREAKING CHANGE:` in footer)

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] [CHANGELOG.md](./CHANGELOG.md) updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)

## How to Validate

### Automated checks

- [ ] CI passes (lint, test, commit-lint, changelog-check, blob-size-policy)
- [ ] Test suite passes: `sh tests/runner.sh` or `sh tests/test_install.sh`
